records.ety: [OE. quilte, OF. cuilte, L. culcita <?/ bed, cushion, mattress. Cf. 2d Counterpoint, Cushion.]

defs: Anything that is quilted; esp., a quilted bed cover, or a skirt worn by women; any cover or garment made by putting wool, cotton, etc., between two cloths and stitching them together; also, any outer bed cover.
quotes: The beds were covered with magnificent quilts.

records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Quilted; p. pr. & vb. n. Quilting.]

defs: To stitch or sew together at frequent intervals, in order to confine in place the several layers of cloth and wadding of which a garment, comforter, etc., may be made; as, to quilt a coat.
To wad, as a garment, with warm soft material.
To stitch or sew in lines or patterns.
